items.final_wording: Supports periodic medication review, accurate medication lists, adherence, continued indication, interaction, monitoring, reconciliation, and nephrotoxic-medicine context without treatment changes or doses.

source.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
source.population: Adults and children at risk of or living with CKD, with age, cause, GFR, albuminuria, progression, treatment, and referral qualifiers.
source.setting: CKD detection, evaluation, monitoring, medication stewardship, referral, and longitudinal kidney care.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected CKD, GFR, albuminuria, medication-review, and referral documentation. Diagnosis, treatment, medicine changes or doses, fixed monitoring intervals beyond stated qualifiers, and UAE service pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

source.title: Medicines adherence: involving patients in decisions about prescribed medicines and supporting adherence
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE adaptation
source.population: People prescribed medicines and healthcare professionals who prescribe, dispense, or review medicines.
source.setting: Shared medicine decisions, adherence assessment, support, and periodic medicine review.
source.exclusions: Exact for non-judgemental adherence history, missed-dose or medicine-taking behaviour documentation, beliefs, concerns, practical barriers, preferred support, and periodic review. It does not recommend a medicine, dose, change, or adherence intervention automatically.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1.19–1.1.23 — knowledge, beliefs, and concerns about medicines

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting the person’s understanding, perceived need, concerns, adverse-effect concerns, daily-routine fit, and questions during medicine review.

items.rationale: Supports review of medicine knowledge, beliefs and concerns for kidney-care medication adherence; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports documenting missed doses, stopping or restarting, intentional or practical barriers, and support preferences without generating an intervention.

added_items.final_wording: Supports periodic medication review, accurate medication lists, adherence, continued indication, interaction, monitoring, reconciliation, and nephrotoxic-medicine context without treatment changes or doses.

source.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
source.population: Adults and children at risk of or living with CKD, with age, cause, GFR, albuminuria, progression, treatment, and referral qualifiers.
source.setting: CKD detection, evaluation, monitoring, medication stewardship, referral, and longitudinal kidney care.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected CKD, GFR, albuminuria, medication-review, and referral documentation. Diagnosis, treatment, medicine changes or doses, fixed monitoring intervals beyond stated qualifiers, and UAE service pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_location.heading: Polypharmacy and drug stewardship
exact_location.locator: Practice Point 4.3.1 and Figure 46; summary PDF pages 50 and 135–137

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports periodic medication review, accurate medication lists, adherence, continued indication, interaction, monitoring, reconciliation, and nephrotoxic-medicine context without treatment changes or doses.

added_items.rationale: Supports CKD polypharmacy and drug stewardship for kidney-care medication adherence; no decision is generated.
